entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The cereal crop being analyzed for consumer preference characteristics.

entities.name: CONSUMER PREFERENCES
entities.description: The preferences of consumers for sorghum based on quality characteristics.

entities.name: QUALITY CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: The evident and cryptic attributes of sorghum that determine consumer preference.

entities.name: EVIDENT QUALITY CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: Visible quality traits of sorghum that affect consumer preferences.

entities.name: CRYPTIC QUALITY CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: Non-visible quality traits of sorghum that affect consumer preferences.

entities.name: MARKET PRICES
entities.description: Daily prices used as a reflection of consumer preferences for sorghum.

entities.name: SORGHUM PREFERENCE INDEX
entities.description: A selection index (SPI) developed to predict consumer preferences based on quality characteristics.

entities.name: TIME SERIES DATA
entities.description: Data collected over a period of time used to derive the SPI.

entities.name: CROSS-SECTIONAL DATA
entities.description: Data collected from multiple sources at a single point in time used to derive the SPI.

entities.name: LARGE-SCALE SCREENING
entities.description: The application of the SPI for evaluating many sorghum samples.
